heading: Wednesday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Chance of a rain or snow shower, then a rising chance late north of Route 2. Lows in the low to mid 30s, some upper 30s in the broad valleys west. South winds around 5 mph, becoming northwest late.

heading: Thursday
text: Decreasing clouds; a morning sprinkle or flurry possible east of the Greens. Gusty, with highs in the low to mid 50s; some upper 40s northeast, and some upper 50s far south, and in the Upper Connecticut Valley. Northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Patchy evening clouds giving way to clearing. Lows from the mid 20s o around 30, except low to mid 30s in the Champlain and Hudson valleys. North to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph.
